title: Skin Grabber
description: SkinGrabber mod. Grabs the skin of the nearest player.
body:
# Skin Grabber
Grabs the skin of the nearest player, to use run `/grabskin`, the player must be within a radius of 5 blocks, or specify the player name directly with `/grabskin [player]`.

## Outdated? Bugs? Crashes?
Join the NowThisIsCrazy Discord, most of my mods are only maintained upon request and handled within the same day, so just ask!

## How to use
Run `/grabskin` to grab the skin of the nearest player, the player must be within a radius of 5 blocks, or use `/grabskin [player]` to specify a player name directly.

The name of the player will be displayed in the chat, and the URL which you can click to open.

Additionally, check the console after running the command for the full decoded skin data.
This includes the skin URL, cape URL (if one is currently equipped), timestamp, profile id, and profile name.

## Example output
![Screenshot of /grabskin in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e7d1423c31256582a7781158b32377c66a80df.png)
```
Grabbing Skin!
-----------------------
Skin: 
Decoded Skin: {
  "timestamp" : 1713001648888,
  "profileId" : "7589b11bfbef42179456702b0b81a83c",
  "profileName" : "NowThisIsCrazy",
  "signatureRequired" : true,
  "textures" : {
    "SKIN" : {
      "url" : "http://textures.minecraft.net/texture/1a4af718455d4aab528e7a61f86fa25e6a369d1768dcb13f7df319a713eb810b"
    }
  }
}
URL: http://textures.minecraft.net/texture/1a4af718455d4aab528e7a61f86fa25e6a369d1768dcb13f7df319a713eb810b
-----------------------
```

### Bugs or Suggestions? [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs) or alternatively [make an issue](https://github.com/Now-this-is-crazy/SkinGrabber/issues)!
